title: Test: Add edge case tests for input validator
original_text: Added edge case tests for the input validator module. Tests cover empty strings, null values, extremely long inputs, special characters, and SQL injection attempts. Also added tests for boundary conditions like minimum and maximum length limits. Updated tests/test_validator.py. Result: 42 tests pass, all edge cases covered.
expected_subject: test(validator): add edge case tests for input validation
expected_body_lines: - Add tests for empty strings and null values
- Test extremely long inputs and special characters
- Test boundary conditions for length limits
- Validation: 42 tests pass, all edge cases covered
expected_command: git commit -m "test(validator): add edge case tests for input validation"
